# Amethyst
**Amethyst** is a handcrafted URL shortener, made with *Node.JS, Express,* and *Handlebars* as the view engine. It is currently only open to whitelisted users. 

## Get your own instance up and running...
... in just a few commands.
- ```git clone git@github.com:mazzlabs/amethyst.git```
- ```cd amethyst && npm install```	
- ```nano .env``` and set ```PASSWORD=WhateverYouLike```
- ```node .```

You can now visit http://localhost:3000 ;)
